qa_pairs.question: According to the experimental data, what was the impact of changing the block read size from 10MB to 100MB when using GNU Parallel for character counting on an 827MB FASTA database with 8 allocated cores?
qa_pairs.answer: When the block read size was 10MB, 83 GNU Parallel jobs were dispatched, using 8 cores, and the task took 0m2.633s. When the block read size was increased to 100MB, 9 GNU Parallel jobs were dispatched, still using 8 cores, and the task completed faster in 0m2.042s.

qa_pairs.question: For a character counting task on an 827MB FASTA database using GNU Parallel with 8 allocated cores, what was the number of GNU Parallel jobs created and the time taken with a 10MB block read size?
qa_pairs.answer: With a 10MB block read size for character counting on an 827MB FASTA database using 8 allocated cores, 83 GNU Parallel jobs were created, and the task took 0m2.633s.
